docs.title: RN38 Build - 1983 Toyota Pickup 4WD
docs.text: A full restoration and modern TDI engine swap of my 1983 Toyota Pickup.

docs.title: Project Goals
docs.text:
• Reliable daily driver
  • Strong off-road capability
  • Better power and fuel economy with a modern TDI engine
  • Keep it looking classic on the outside

docs.title: Major Work
docs.text:
• CBEA 2.0 TDI Engine Swap (from Audi A3)
  • R151F Transmission
  • Custom mounts and adapters
  • Upgraded brakes and suspension
  • Full mechanical refresh

Browse the sections above to see detailed build logs, photos, and CAD files.

docs.title: TDI Engine Swap
docs.text: This is the main part of the build — swapping a modern CBEA 2.0 TDI into the 1983 Toyota.

docs.title: Current Status
docs.text:
• Engine: CBEA 2.0 TDI (Tunezilla Stage 2.5)
  • Transmission: R151F
  • Mounts: TD Conversions adapter + custom work

docs.title: Key Challenges & Solutions
docs.text:
Turbo Routing - Flipped the turbo to route exhaust toward the rear... (add your notes here)

Oil Pan - Comparing factory aluminum vs hybrid steel/aluminum pan... (add photos and notes)

EGR Block-off Plates - CAD files available in the repo: Block-off Plates
